creator: emz@norman-vivat.ru
text:
Hi.

net/asterisk-1.4.18_1 is fine by itself on 7.0-RELEASE.
the problem esides in the pwlib <-> openh323 bundle.

I found one possible fix to solve the problem:

pwlib should be rolled back to pwlib-1.10.3_1,1
openh323 should be rolled back to openh323-1.18.0_3.

This makes the asterisk to compile fine.

Eugene.
